repository_secrets.name: CODECOV_TOKEN
repository_secrets.purpose: Upload unit coverage and test-result reports to Codecov.
repository_secrets.rotation: Create a replacement upload token in Codecov, update the GitHub Actions secret, verify one CI upload, then revoke the previous token.

environments.name: npm-publish
environments.auth_model: GitHub OIDC trusted publishing to npm; the workflow grants id-token: write and does not use a static npm credential.
environments.rotation: No npm credential is stored. Revoke or replace npm trusted-publisher configuration and GitHub environment access if the trust relationship changes.
